en: He searches for the limits and fights against the urge to breathe with beautiful thoughts: how Christian Langer went from being a professional ice hockey player to becoming a free diver. Christian Langer, 56, once glided across the ice - today he dives under water. In 1997 he won the championship trophy with SC Bern. Thirty years later he is the Swiss champion and world champion in unpowered diving.
